trends.label: real
trends.title: AI Agent 生态持续扩展
trends.text: 多 agent、工具调用、浏览器操作等方向正在从 demo 走向生产

trends.label: watch
trends.title: AI 视频生成竞赛加速
trends.text: 多家公司发布视频生成模型，质量和速度都在快速提升

trends.label: watch
trends.title: Benchmark 刷新频率加快
trends.text: 模型性能天花板持续提升，但实际应用差距仍待验证

trends.label: real
trends.title: 多模态成为标配
trends.text: 文本、图像、音频、视频的统一处理能力越来越普遍

trends.label: watch
trends.title: AI 监管政策收紧
trends.text: 全球多地出台 AI 相关法规，合规成本上升

trends.label: hype
trends.title: AI 替代一切的叙事
trends.text: AI 在特定任务上表现优异，但通用替代仍需时间

cover.title: Unmasking On-Policy Distillation: Where It Helps, Where It Hurts, and Why
cover.summary: On-policy distillation offers dense, per-token supervision for training reasoning models; however, it remains unclear under which conditions this signal is beneficial and under which it is…
cover.why_it_matters: Unmasking On-Policy… 让 AI 能同时处理文本、图像、语音，应用场景扩大了
cover.content_angle: 写 Unmasking On-Policy… 的微调教程，发帖「手把手教你训练自己的 AI 模型」

cover.title: ELF: Embedded Language Flows
cover.summary: Diffusion and flow-based models have become the de facto approaches for generating continuous data, e.g., in domains such as images and videos. Their success has attracted growing interest in…
cover.why_it_matters: ELF 降低了视觉内容创作门槛，非设计师也能做出专业素材
cover.content_angle: 拿 ELF 生成一组作品截图，发帖「AI 做的图/视频能到什么水平了」

cover.title: InfoLaw: Information Scaling Laws for Large Language Models with Quality-Weighted Mixture Data and Repetition
cover.summary: Upweighting high-quality data in LLM pretraining often improves performance, but in datalimited regimes, especially under overtraining, stronger upweighting increases repetition and can degrade…

cover.content_angle: 写 InfoLaw 的微调教程，发帖「手把手教你训练自己的 AI 模型」

cover.title: GridProbe: Posterior-Probing for Adaptive Test-Time Compute in Long-Video VLMs
